query: SELECT l.name, SUM(ds.totalSales) as monthTotal, SUM(ds.taxExemptSales) as monthTaxExempt, SUM(ds.taxableSales) as monthTaxable, SUM(ds.gstCollected) as monthGst, SUM(ds.qstCollected) as monthQst, COUNT(*) as days FROM dailySales ds LEFT JOIN locations l ON ds.locationId = l.id WHERE ds.saleDate BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-17' GROUP BY ds.locationId ORDER BY ds.locationId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT l.name, SUM(ds.totalSales) as monthTotal, SUM(ds.taxExemptSales) as monthTaxExempt, SUM(ds.taxableSales) as monthTaxable, SUM(ds.gstCollected) as monthGst, SUM(ds.qstCollected) as monthQst, COUNT(*) as days FROM dailySales ds LEFT JOIN locations l ON ds.locationId = l.id WHERE ds.saleDate BETWEEN '2026-03-01' AND '2026-03-17' GROUP BY ds.locationId ORDER BY ds.locationId;
